basic_details.job_title: ESIC Model Hospital Phulwarisharif Specialists Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: ESIC Model Hospital Phulwarisharif Recruitment 2026: ESIC Model Hospital Phulwarisharif is conducting a Walk-in Interview for 5 Specialists posts. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for eligible candidates to attend the interview directly without any prior online application.

age_limit.details: Junior Specialist: Maximum Age 67 years Senior Specialist: Maximum Age 67 years Part Time Specialists: Maximum Age 67 years

qualification.education_qualification: PG Degree/Diploma in concerned Specialty and registered with Medical Council of India.
qualification.details: Junior Specialist: PG Degree in concerned Specialty and registered with Medical Council of India. Experience: 03 years experience post PG in the concerned specialty. Senior Specialist: PG Degree in the concerned Specialty and registered with Medical Council of India. Experience: 05 years experience post PG in the concerned specialty. Part Time Specialists: PG Degree/Diploma in concerned Specialty and registered with Medical Council of India. Experience: PG Degree or equivalent in concerned specialty from Recognized University with 03 years experience after acquiring PG degree. OR Minimum of 05 years experience in the concerned specialty after acquiring PG Diploma.

salary_details.pay_scale: Part Time Specialists: Fixed Remuneration (For 16hr/week) Rs. 60000, Visiting Charge in case of emergency call Rs. 15000, Additional Remuneration above 16hr/week Rs. 800/hr
salary_details.details: Junior Specialist: Remuneration as per ESIC Hqrs. Office Letter No. OM Z-11012/51/2022-MED-VI dated 08.12.2022 Senior Specialist: Remuneration as per ESIC Hqrs. Office Letter No. OM Z-11012/51/2022-MED-VI dated 08.12.2022 Part Time Specialists: Fixed Remuneration (For 16hr/week): Rs. 60000, Visiting Charge in case of emergency call: Rs. 15000, Additional Remuneration above 16hr/week: Rs. 800/hr

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Model Hospital Phulwarisharif Recruitment?
faq.answer: The initial walk-in interview is scheduled for 19th June 2026. Subsequent interviews will be held on the 3rd Friday of every month until March 2027.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies available for Specialists?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for Specialists posts at ESIC Model Hospital Phulwarisharif.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Specialist posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a PG Degree/Diploma in the concerned Specialty and be registered with the Medical Council of India.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Specialist positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Specialist positions is 67 years.

faq.question: Q5. How will the candidates be selected for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a Walk-in-Interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the ESIC Model Hospital Phulwarisharif Recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 400 for General, EWS, and OBC candidates, Rs. 100 for SC/ST candidates, and exempted for female candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should candidates bring to the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should bring self-attested copies of their SSC/10th Certificate, MBBS and PG Degree Certificates, MCI Registration, category certificates (if applicable), experience certificates, and two passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q8. What is the reporting time for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The reporting time for the walk-in interview is between 09:00 AM and 10:30 AM.

faq.question: Q9. What is the salary offered for Part-Time Specialists?
faq.answer: Part-Time Specialists will receive a fixed remuneration of Rs. 60,000 for 16 hours/week, with additional charges for emergency calls and extra hours.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any experience required for the Specialist posts?
faq.answer: Yes, experience requirements vary. Junior Specialists need 3 years post-PG experience, Senior Specialists need 5 years post-PG experience, and Part-Time Specialists need 3 years post-PG Degree or 5 years post-PG Diploma experience.
